notes: Core Galaga mechanics are solid (formation marching, diving, tractor beam, multi-level progression) but sprite art is very basic pixel-rect shapes lacking authentic Galaga look, and the tractor beam capture logic silently deducts a life without proper dual-ship rescue mechanic.
Core gameplay loop is present, but the enemy formation is upside-down (bosses at the bottom) and the iconic dual-ship capture mechanic is completely broken/missing.

The game is mostly functional and playable with responsive controls, but it misses key Galaga-specific behaviors like proper formations/capture mechanics and uses very simplified visuals that only loosely resemble the original.
